CONTENT.Early life: Imbrechts grew up in Namur, Belgium.
CONTENT.Club career: In 2021, he signed for Belgian side Union SG, where he was in the club's squads for the 2022–23 UEFA Champions League and 2022–23 UEFA Europa League. He made his professional debut on the 1 October 2023, with Union Saint-Gilloise against his former club Charleroi. On the 9 May 2024, he won the Belgian Cup.
CONTENT.Personal life: Imbrechts regards Sweden international Zlatan Ibrahimovic as his football idol. He was born to a Swedish mother and a Belgian father.
CONTENT.International career: Imbrechts initially represented Belgium internationally, playing in Belgium national under-17 football team friendlies. He then switched to representing Sweden and debuted for the under-17 team at the 2018 Four Nations Tournament.

SUMMARY: Joachim Lasse Imbrechts (born 9 October 2001) is a footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Union SG. Born in Belgium, he represented it internationally on junior levels, before switching to representing Sweden.
